name: Amaretto Bars/WD
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
In a large bowl, combine the flour and sugar. With a pastry blender or 2 knives, cut in the butter until crumbly. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan. Bake for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir the cornstarch into the amaretto until dissolved; then stir in the condensed milk. Pour the mixture evenly over the prebaked crust. Top with the chocolate chips, coconut and almonds; press down firmly.
Bake for 25 to 30 minutes longer, or until golden brown. Cool in the pan on a wire rack. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
